name: Wyvern
description: A flying dragon with two wings and a long tail. It attacks from the sky with fire and speed. (Special Enemy Crew)

name: Manticore
description: A lion-like monster with a tiger body and a scorpion tail. It's cruel and smart, hunting prey for fun. (Special Enemy Crew)

name: Basilisk
description: A giant snake with deadly eyes. One look can make enemy shivering. (Special Enemy Crew)

name: Minotaur
description: A huge bull-headed warrior. It charges with brute force and loses control in battle rage. (Special Enemy Crew)
